key_functionalities: Lawyer Admin panel to view/manage clients and documents
Document status management (Pendiente de revisión -> Revisado)
SMTP configuration for admin email notifications

surfaces.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-md
surfaces.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200
surfaces.inputs: bg-white border border-slate-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 focus:border-slate-900 transition-colors

shadcn_customizations.Button: Use solid slate-900 for primary actions. Remove rounded-full, use rounded-md. Ensure text contrast is perfect.
shadcn_customizations.Table: Dense padding (py-2 px-4). Use IBM Plex Sans for tabular data to ensure numbers (NIE/Passport) align perfectly.
shadcn_customizations.Card: Use flat design with 1px border-slate-200. Minimal shadow.
shadcn_customizations.Badge: Use soft backgrounds with dark text for statuses (e.g., Amber for Pendiente, Emerald for Revisado).

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5, standard sizing (w-4 h-4 for inline, w-5 h-5 for sidebar).

forms.layout: Left-align all labels. Use grid for complex forms (e.g., origin country + residence country on same row).
forms.required_fields: Clearly mark required fields. Add helper text for NIE/Passport formats if possible.

login_background.description: Modern minimalist corporate building, bright and clean. Used for the right side of the split auth screen.

logo_placeholder.usage: Sidebar logo area or login screen brand icon

auth.layout: Split screen layout (50/50). Form on the left with generous padding, login_background image on the right with object-cover.

client_portal.dashboard: Welcome header. Large 'Upload Document' drag-and-drop zone. Table below showing uploaded documents, original file name, upload date/time, and status badge.

admin_portal.layout: Standard Dashboard layout with sticky left Sidebar and top Header.

clients_view.filters: Top bar with search input for NIE/Passport, and dropdown for Country of Origin.
clients_view.table: List of clients showing Name, NIE/Passport, Email, Origin. Clicking a row opens Client Detail view.

client_detail_view.header: Client identity card (all personal info: email, phone, address, city, origin, residence).
client_detail_view.documents_section: Table of uploaded documents. Actions column: Download (icon), Change Status Dropdown, Delete (icon, red hover).

settings_view.smtp_form: Form for lawyer to configure SMTP host, port, user, password, from_email for notifications.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. e.g., data-testid='upload-doc-button', data-testid='filter-country-select', data-testid='status-badge-pending'.
